clip_summary.primary_subject_description: Right-arm medium-fast bowler in a black shirt and dark green trousers.

subject_strategy.selection_reason: The subject in black/green enters the frame from the left and completes a full bowling action, whereas the person in red remains stationary in the background.

editorial.title: Side-On Bowling Mechanics Analysis
editorial.subtitle: Evaluating release height and follow-through extension in outdoor nets.
editorial.fallback_insight: The bowler maintains a low center of gravity through the crease, aiding in directional stability during the delivery phase.
editorial.fallback_takeaway: Focus on maintaining head height to ensure consistent release points across the spell.
editorial.fallback_release_note: The arm is fully extended at release, maximizing the leverage and potential pace generated from the run-up.
editorial.fallback_finish_note: The follow-through shows good deceleration, though the bowler exits the frame quickly, suggesting high momentum.

notes: Background person in red is close to the bowler's line in F3. Bowler moves very fast across the frame.
